summary: Following his successful livestream, Hyunwoo (Alley Boss) becomes a hot topic, drawing attention and potential sponsorship offers from major guilds like Arena and Phoenix. Hyunwoo meets with the Emperor to receive a special mission, tasked with finding an individual named Aldred in the Arti Desert to investigate growing rebel forces. After navigating the desert, he connects with Aldred, acquires a new sword skill, and prepares to leverage his past-life knowledge to stay ahead of other players in the main scenario.
key_moments: Guilds start competing to recruit or eliminate Hyunwoo due to his rising popularity and success.
Hyunwoo meets the Emperor and receives the 'Emperor's Gift' quest to investigate rebels in the Arti Desert.
Hyunwoo finds the Knight Captain Aldred, earns a new rare skill, and identifies key locations linked to the rebellion.
